title: HyperDown Configuration
description: Schema for hyperdown.config.json — centralized configuration for database generation, sitemap, and i18n.

$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema file for IDE intellisense.

contentDir.description: The base directory for all content, relative to the app working directory.

frontmatterJsonPath.description: Absolute or relative path to the frontmatter.json file.

outputPath.description: Output path for the generated SQLite database, relative to the config file.

index.description: Default indexing granularity for every collection. 'page' (default) indexes the whole document body under its slug. 'composed' additionally indexes each heading section, enabling section-level search and a section tree for sidebars.

indexByCollection.description: Per-collection overrides for the 'index' mode, keyed by content-type name (e.g. { "article": "composed" }).

siteUrl.description: Base URL of the site (no trailing slash).

outputPath.description: Relative path from this config file to the output sitemap.xml.

staticRoutes.description: Static routes to include in the sitemap.

contentTypes.description: Content types to scan for dynamic sitemap entries.

strategy.description: The i18n detection strategy (currently supports folder).

sitemapRoute.description: A static route entry for the sitemap.

changefreq.description: How frequently the page is likely to change.

sitemapContentType.description: Configuration for a dynamic content type in the sitemap.

basePath.description: URL path prefix for this content type.

changefreq.description: How frequently the page is likely to change.
